title: Jira MCP Server for Claude
detailMarkdown:
# Jira MCP Server for Claude
Manage Jira tickets and Confluence documentation
**Category:** mcp
**Author:** Atlassian
**Download trust:** first-party
**Tags:** `jira` `confluence` `atlassian` `project-management` `documentation`

## Install
```bash
claude mcp list && claude mcp status jira
```

## Config
```json
{
  "atlassian": {
    "url": "https://mcp.atlassian.com/v1/sse",
    "transport": "sse"
  }
}
```

## Usage
claude mcp list && claude mcp status jira

## Links
- https://heyclau.de/mcp/jira-mcp-server
- https://www.atlassian.com/platform/remote-mcp-server
